hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory/*) git -C /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory add -A && git -C /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory commit -m "update" && git -C /home/em/.claude/projects/-home-em-development/memory push 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in /home/em/.claude-config/*|/home/em/.claude/settings.json|/home/em/.claude/statusline.sh|/home/em/.claude/session_start.sh) git -C /home/em/.claude-config add -A && git -C /home/em/.claude-config commit -m "update" && git -C /home/em/.claude-config push 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true
